title.en: Measuring the Radio: RM, Measurement Request/Report & Neighbor Elements
title.zh: 丈量射频：无线电测量请求/报告与邻居元素

blocks.en: A Wi-Fi network is a noisy, crowded place, and the access point can't see all of it from where it sits. So 802.11 turns the stations themselves into sensors. The radio-measurement (RM, often called 802.11k) family of elements is the vocabulary for this: the AP asks a station 'go measure the channel load / the noise / a particular beacon / your own link', the station goes and listens, and answers with a Measurement Report. A companion element, the Neighbor Report, hands the station a pre-made map of nearby APs so that roaming becomes a guided step rather than a blind, full-spectrum scan.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 网络是一个嘈杂而拥挤的环境，接入点（AP）从它所在的位置无法看清全貌。于是 802.11 干脆把各个站点变成了传感器。无线电测量（RM，通常称为 802.11k）这一族元素就是为此而生的“词汇表”：AP 请站点“去测一下信道负载／噪声／某个特定的信标／你自己这条链路”，站点照办、监听，然后用一份测量报告（Measurement Report）作答。还有一个配套元素——邻居报告（Neighbor Report）——会把附近 AP 的现成地图交给站点，让漫游从一次盲目的全频段扫描，变成一个有向导的步骤。

blocks.en: Think of it as a survey crew. The RM Enabled Capabilities element is each station's business card ('here's what I can measure'); the Measurement Request is the work order; the Measurement Report is the filled-in survey; RCPI / RSNI / Antenna are the instrument readings; and the BSS-load family plus Neighbor / AP Channel Report are the maps and traffic notices handed around so everyone roams smarter.
blocks.zh: 可以把它想象成一支勘测队。RM Enabled Capabilities 元素是每个站点的名片（“我能测量这些”）；Measurement Request 是派工单；Measurement Report 是填好的勘测表；RCPI／RSNI／Antenna 是各类仪器读数；而 BSS 负载这一族再加上 Neighbor／AP Channel Report，则是大家互相传递的地图和路况通报，好让漫游更聪明。

blocks.en: Start with capability and the core exchange. The RM Enabled Capabilities element (9.4.2.43) is a 5-octet bitmap a station advertises in its association frames: each bit flips on one skill — Link Measurement, Neighbor Report, Beacon (passive/active/table), Channel Load, Noise Histogram, RCPI, RSNI, Antenna and more. Once both ends know what's possible, the AP sends a Measurement Request element (9.4.2.19): a small header (Measurement Token, a request-mode bitmap, a Measurement Type) followed by a type-specific body. The Measurement Type chooses the job — Channel Load, Noise Histogram, Beacon, Frame, STA Statistics, LCI, and so on. The station replies with a matching Measurement Report element (9.4.2.20), the same token tying answer to question, carrying the result for that very type.
blocks.zh: 先从能力和核心交换说起。RM Enabled Capabilities 元素（9.4.2.43）是站点在其关联帧中通告的一个 5 字节位图：每一位开启一项技能——链路测量、邻居报告、信标（被动／主动／表）、信道负载、噪声直方图、RCPI、RSNI、天线等等。一旦双方都清楚“能做什么”，AP 就发出 Measurement Request 元素（9.4.2.19）：一个小小的头部（测量令牌 Measurement Token、一个请求模式位图、一个测量类型 Measurement Type），后面跟着随类型而变的主体。Measurement Type 决定要干哪件活——信道负载、噪声直方图、信标、帧、STA 统计、LCI 等等。站点则用一份对应的 Measurement Report 元素（9.4.2.20）作答，同一个令牌把答案和问题绑在一起，承载该类型的测量结果。

caption.en: The Measurement Request header is identical no matter the job; only the trailing Measurement Request field changes with the Measurement Type.
caption.zh: 无论要测什么，Measurement Request 的头部都相同；只有末尾的 Measurement Request 字段随 Measurement Type 而变化。

blocks.en: Several elements are pure instrument readings the reports carry. RCPI (9.4.2.36) is one octet of received RF power — a logarithmic scale where, for example, 0 means below about -109.5 dBm and 255 means 'not available'. RSNI (9.4.2.39) is one octet of received signal-to-noise-plus-interference ratio in 0.5 dB steps, computed from RCPI and the measured noise floor. The Antenna element (9.4.2.38) is one octet naming which antenna (or antenna configuration) took the reading, so a directional or MIMO result isn't ambiguous. Together these three answer 'how strong, how clean, and on which antenna' for any measured frame or link.
blocks.zh: 有几个元素纯粹是报告所携带的仪器读数。RCPI（9.4.2.36）是 1 个字节的接收射频功率——一个对数刻度，例如 0 表示低于约 -109.5 dBm，255 表示“不可用”。RSNI（9.4.2.39）是 1 个字节、以 0.5 dB 为步进的接收信噪加干扰比，由 RCPI 和实测噪声底共同算出。Antenna 元素（9.4.2.38）则用 1 个字节标明是哪根天线（或哪种天线配置）做的测量，这样定向或 MIMO 结果就不会含混。这三者合起来，为任何被测的帧或链路回答了“多强、多干净、用哪根天线”。

blocks.en: A second cluster describes how busy a BSS is — useful when a station is choosing which AP to land on. BSS Average Access Delay (9.4.2.37) is a single scalar octet: a low value means the AP grabs the medium quickly, a high value means contention. BSS AC Access Delay (9.4.2.42) breaks that out per access category (the four EDCA traffic classes). BSS Available Admission Capacity (9.4.2.41) is a bitmask plus a list saying how much admission-controlled medium time is still free per traffic type. Extended BSS Load (9.4.2.158), reported by the AP, adds MU-MIMO spatial-stream and wide-bandwidth utilisation. Meanwhile AP Channel Report (9.4.2.34) lists the channels where a station is likely to find an AP, and Measurement Pilot Transmission (9.4.2.40) advertises the interval of the AP's lightweight measurement pilot frames so a roamer knows when to listen.
blocks.zh: 第二组元素描述一个 BSS 有多繁忙——当站点在挑选落脚哪个 AP 时很有用。BSS Average Access Delay（9.4.2.37）是单个标量字节：值低表示 AP 能很快抢到信道，值高表示竞争激烈。BSS AC Access Delay（9.4.2.42）把它按接入类别（EDCA 的四类业务）逐一拆开。BSS Available Admission Capacity（9.4.2.41）是一个位图加一份列表，说明每类业务还剩多少受准入控制的介质时间。Extended BSS Load（9.4.2.158）由 AP 上报，补充了 MU-MIMO 空间流和宽带宽的利用率。与此同时，AP Channel Report（9.4.2.34）列出站点最可能找到 AP 的那些信道，而 Measurement Pilot Transmission（9.4.2.40）通告 AP 那些轻量级测量导频帧的间隔，让漫游者知道何时去监听。

blocks.en: The Neighbor Report element (9.4.2.35) is the keystone for fast roaming: for one neighboring AP it gives the BSSID, a BSSID Information bitmap (reachability, security match, same mobility domain, HT/VHT/HE/FTM support, co-location flags), the operating class, channel and PHY type, and optional subelements that can even nest an RM Enabled Capabilities, a BSS Load, or a transition-preference hint. Finally, Extended Link Measurement (9.4.2.288) is the DMG/60 GHz cousin used in Link Measurement Request/Report frames — its subelements solicit periodic link reports and carry extended transmit-power configuration. With the catalog mapped, the deepdive pins the two elements whose exact encodings are easiest to misremember.
blocks.zh: Neighbor Report 元素（9.4.2.35）是快速漫游的基石：针对一个邻近 AP，它给出 BSSID、一个 BSSID Information 位图（可达性、安全是否匹配、是否同一移动域、是否支持 HT/VHT/HE/FTM、共址标志等）、操作类、信道与 PHY 类型，以及一些可选子元素——后者甚至可以内嵌一个 RM Enabled Capabilities、一个 BSS Load，或一条切换偏好提示。最后，Extended Link Measurement（9.4.2.288）是用于 Link Measurement Request/Report 帧的 DMG／60 GHz 表亲——它的子元素用来请求周期性链路报告，并携带扩展的发射功率配置。把目录梳理清楚后，深入解析会钉牢两个最容易记错其精确编码的元素。

summary.en: Exact encodings: RCPI/RSNI scales and the RM capability bitmap
summary.zh: 精确编码：RCPI/RSNI 刻度与 RM 能力位图

blocks.en: RCPI (9.4.2.36) is a one-octet value RCPI = floor((P + 110) x 2) for received power P in dBm: value 0 means P < -109.5 dBm, values 1-219 step across the range, 220 represents +0 dBm, 221-254 are reserved, and 255 means 'measurement not available'. RSNI (9.4.2.39) is one octet in 0.5 dB steps computed as RSNI = (10 x log10((RCPIpower - ANPIpower) / ANPIpower) + 10) x 2, covering -10 dB to +117 dB, with 255 meaning unavailable. The RM Enabled Capabilities field (9.4.2.43) is exactly 5 octets (40 bits): bit 0 is Link Measurement, bit 1 Neighbor Report, bits 4-6 Beacon Passive/Active/Table, bit 9 Channel Load, bit 10 Noise Histogram, bit 16 AP Channel Report, bits 29/30 RCPI/RSNI Measurement, bit 31 BSS Average Access Delay, bit 32 BSS Available Admission Capacity, bit 33 Antenna; bits 18-20 and 21-23 are the operating/non-operating channel max measurement durations. The Measurement Request Mode (9.4.2.19) is a bitmap of Parallel, Enable, Request, Report and Duration Mandatory subfields that distinguish a one-shot measurement from enabling/disabling autonomous or triggered reports.
blocks.zh: RCPI（9.4.2.36）是一个 1 字节值，对接收功率 P（dBm）有 RCPI = floor((P + 110) x 2)：值 0 表示 P < -109.5 dBm，1-219 逐级覆盖该区间，220 表示 +0 dBm，221-254 保留，255 表示“测量不可用”。RSNI（9.4.2.39）为 1 字节、0.5 dB 步进，按 RSNI = (10 x log10((RCPIpower - ANPIpower) / ANPIpower) + 10) x 2 计算，覆盖 -10 dB 到 +117 dB，255 表示不可用。RM Enabled Capabilities 字段（9.4.2.43）恰为 5 字节（40 位）：第 0 位是 Link Measurement，第 1 位 Neighbor Report，第 4-6 位 Beacon 被动／主动／表，第 9 位 Channel Load，第 10 位 Noise Histogram，第 16 位 AP Channel Report，第 29/30 位 RCPI/RSNI Measurement，第 31 位 BSS Average Access Delay，第 32 位 BSS Available Admission Capacity，第 33 位 Antenna；第 18-20 位与 21-23 位分别是操作信道／非操作信道的最大测量时长。Measurement Request Mode（9.4.2.19）是一个由 Parallel、Enable、Request、Report 和 Duration Mandatory 子字段组成的位图，用来区分一次性测量与启用／停用自主或触发式报告。
